# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GITLAB_TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN
  DEPLOYMENT_TAG: "deploy-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE// /-}"

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - ./build.sh
  only:
    - merge_requests

test_job:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - ./test.sh
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy_job:
  stage: deploy
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project to production..."
    - git tag $DEPLOYMENT_TAG
    - git push origin $DEPLOYMENT_TAG
  only:
    - merge_requests
